description: Harbor Skills OS — automatic skill detection and injection for Claude Code

hooks.command: HARBOR_DIR="${HARBOR_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/root/harbor-agent}"; curl -sf http://localhost:37701/harness/status > /dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "$HARBOR_DIR" && node dist/index.js &>/dev/null & disown && sleep 2); echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true,"status":"ready"}'
